Order To Show Cause For A Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Reilly Wilkinson of the Scheer Law Group (491.8900) for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. A proof of service was presented to the Court, and the Court granted PLAINTIFF SF POLICE CREDIT UNION'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Order To Show Cause For A Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Sep-30-2008 Continued To Oct-09-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jonathan Siegel of the Scheer Law Group (491.8900) for plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances on this matter. Mr. Siegel requested a continuance of the matter to obtain the proof of service from the process server. The Court continued PLAINTIFF'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION to October 9, 2008. Temporary restraining order is to remain in effect until that date. Counsel to provide notice. Order regarding the continuance signed in open Court. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
